news.headline: Transgene (Euronext Paris: TNG) to meet with industry leaders for potential collaborations in upcoming meetings.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.9%, which is the lowest it has been in the past decade. The report also highlights that 250,000 new jobs were added last month, predominantly in the technology and healthcare sectors. Analysts suggest that the surge in employment can be attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in the manufacturing industry. It is anticipated that this positive trend will continue in the upcoming months, leading to further growth in the job market. Additionally, the report mentions that the average hourly wage has seen a 2.5% increase, signaling improved economic conditions for workers. Overall, the data reflects a promising outlook for the job market and the economy as a whole.

news.summary: Recently, there has been a notable shift in sentiment towards digital assets within the realm of traditional finance. Major players such as BlackRock, JPMorgan, and Franklin Templeton have been taking steps to explore opportunities in this space. This shift highlights a growing interest in digital assets as potential investment avenues.
news.headline: Franklin Templeton CEO predicts rapid transition to digital assets in finance as major firms embrace change.

news.summary: Chainalysis has reported that despite numerous efforts to eradicate the crypto-crime-associated Huione, there has not been a significant decrease in its transactions.
news.headline: Darknet Huione operating at maximum capacity despite shutdown efforts. Chainalysis reports no decrease in transactions.

news.summary: Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN), introduced the company’s new cryptocurrency credit card on Thursday, offering cashback rewards in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). The Coinbase One Card, crafted from metal and featuring Bitcoin’s Genesis block engraving, is supported by American Express Co. (NYSE: AXP). Users can earn up to 4% in Bitcoin rewards for every purchase, but must subscribe to the premium service Coinbase One with an annual fee starting at $49.99. Rewards will be determined by the Coinbase balance, with higher balances receiving more BTC. The company retains the right to select eligible reward transactions. The launch for the Coinbase One Card is scheduled for fall 2025.
news.headline: Coinbase CEO unveils crypto credit card offering up to 4% Bitcoin cashback powered by Amex. Available only to $49.99/year subscription members, launching in fall 2025 with certain conditions.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the United States economy expanded by 6.4% in the first quarter of the year, which was a significant increase from the 4.3% growth in the previous quarter. This growth was attributed to increased consumer spending and business investments. Additionally, the number of jobless claims dropped to 553,000, which is the lowest level since the start of the pandemic. This positive trend in the economy has raised hopes for a strong recovery in the coming months.
news.headline: Gas prices in Europe surge due to renewed Middle East threats, impacting markets significantly.

news.headline: Crypto exchange releases Bitcoin rewards card to boost users, plans to add more tokens later, as reported.

news.headline: BTC drops to $103K post Israel's airstrikes on Iran. GameStop CEO advised to buy by founder Samson Mow amidst the dip.

news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the current death toll from the ongoing pandemic stands at over 4.5 million globally, with more than 200 million confirmed cases. The rapid spread of the virus has put immense pressure on healthcare systems worldwide, with many hospitals nearing full capacity. In response to the situation, governments are implementing various measures such as lockdowns and vaccine distribution campaigns to curb the spread of the virus. Despite these efforts, concerns remain about the emergence of new variants and the effectiveness of existing vaccines against them. The global economy has also been significantly impacted, with job losses and supply chain disruptions affecting industries across the board. As the situation continues to evolve, experts emphasize the importance of following public health guidelines and getting vaccinated to help bring an end to the pandemic.
news.headline: Chinese companies in discussions to team up with a consortium for Li Ka-Shing's ports, as reported by Bloomberg.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. The report also highlighted that over 300,000 new jobs were added in the last month, showing a significant improvement in the labor market. Additionally, the report indicated that the economy grew by 5.6% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and marking a strong recovery from the previous downturn. Analysts predict further growth in the coming months, fueled by increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the latest data signals a positive trend in the country's economic landscape.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Artea Bankas AB, hereinafter referred to as the Bank, acquired its own shares. In accordance with Article 19(2) of the Law on Securities of the Republic of Lithuania, the Bank discloses information regarding the total number of voting rights associated with the shares it has issued, along with details on its authorized capital, the quantity of shares, and their nominal value.
news.headline: Artea Bankas AB reports on voting rights and authorized capital after acquiring own shares on 13 June 2025.

news.summary: During the month of May, Enefit Green generated a total of 153.2 gigawatt hours (GWh) of electricity. This marked a substantial increase of nearly 30% compared to the previous year's production. The surge in output was attributed to the incorporation of new renewable energy facilities into the company's production assets within the last year. Significant contributors to this boost were the Sopi-Tootsi and Kelme I wind farms, as well as the Sopi solar farm.
news.headline: Enefit Green produced 153.2 GWh of electricity in May 2025, showing a nearly 30% increase from the previous year with the addition of new wind and solar farms.

news.summary: Economist Justin Wolfers has criticized the Trump administration's tax, tariff, and budget policies, describing them as one of the most unequal transfers of wealth in U.S. history. In a recent post, Wolfers pointed out the regressive nature of Trump's economic strategies, emphasizing that the tax cuts mainly benefit the wealthy. The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) estimates that the "One Big, Beautiful Bill" would lead to a 4% increase in resources for the top ten percent of households by 2027, while causing a 2% decline for those in the lowest income bracket. Furthermore, Wolfers highlighted that the administration's spending cuts disproportionately impact the poor, including the removal of 3.2 million individuals from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) food stamp program.
news.headline: Economist Justin Wolfers criticizes Trump's economic policies, calling them the largest wealth redistribution to the rich in US history. Tax cuts benefit wealthiest with 4% increase in resources by 2027, while cutting SNAP program for 3.2 million.
